wanted.name: TradeTracker
wanted.note: Global, NL-headquartered. SOAP-based but functional; affiliate.tradetracker.com/webService.

wanted.name: Adcell
wanted.note: DACH network (now under mrge holding). API exists for publishers but docs are dashboard-gated — expect reverse-engineering.

wanted.name: ClickBank
wanted.note: Digital products giant. Analytics + Order APIs are public; no dev key required since 2023.

wanted.name: Amazon Creators API
wanted.note: Successor to PA-API (which deprecates 15 May 2026). Docs at affiliate-program.amazon.com/creatorsapi/docs.

wanted.name: TUNE (HasOffers)
wanted.note: Long-running CPA platform. Public REST docs at developers.tune.com.

wanted.name: ShopMy
wanted.note: US creator network. OAuth-based creator/brand API, public docs at docs.shopmy.us.

wanted.name: Levanta
wanted.note: Amazon-focused creator platform. /partners /products /reports endpoints public (knowledge.levanta.io/creator-api).

wanted.name: Tolt
wanted.note: SaaS-focused affiliate platform. Bearer-auth REST, public docs at docs.tolt.com.

wanted.name: Refersion
wanted.note: Shopify-heavy affiliate platform. Full public docs at refersion.dev.

wanted.name: Tapfiliate
wanted.note: Mid-market multi-platform. v1.6 X-Api-Key REST, public docs at tapfiliate.com/docs/rest.

wanted.name: Howl (Narrativ)
wanted.note: Independent creator / journalist link network. API key + REST documented at docs.narrativ.com.

wanted.name: Involve Asia
wanted.note: APAC's growing network. Public REST docs.

wanted.name: ShareASale
wanted.note: Major US network (Awin-owned but a separate account + API). Self-serve Reporting API keyed by Affiliate ID + Token + Secret Key, generated in Tools > API Reporting (account.shareasale.com/a-apimanager.cfm). On wecantrack; not the same surface as the existing Awin adapter.

wanted.name: Pepperjam (Ascend by Partnerize)
wanted.note: US network, now branded Ascend by Partnerize but a distinct API from the existing Partnerize adapter. REST at api.pepperjamnetwork.com; API key self-issued in Resources > API Keys (ascend.pepperjam.com/affiliate/api/). Docs: ascendpartner.zendesk.com API Overview.

wanted.name: AvantLink
wanted.note: US/outdoor-niche network. Self-serve REST API; publisher modules include Affiliate Report, Transaction Inquiry, Product Search (support.avantlink.com API Module docs).

wanted.name: Digistore24
wanted.note: German digital-products giant. Full self-serve developer portal (dev.digistore24.com) + Swagger; API key created in-dashboard. Affiliate + vendor sales data.

wanted.name: Belboon
wanted.note: DACH performance network. wecantrack pulls conversions via the Belboon API on a schedule; confirm self-serve key issuance + endpoint before building.

wanted.name: financeAds
wanted.note: DACH finance-vertical network. API integration offered via wecantrack; verify public self-serve API docs before building.

wanted.name: Yieldkit
wanted.note: Link-monetisation network (Skimlinks/Sovrn competitor; now owns Digidip). wecantrack connects via the Yieldkit API and matches commissions per session; verify self-serve API docs.

wanted.name: Affise
wanted.note: Multiplier — CPA tenant engine. One parameterised adapter covers every Affise-powered network: base URL = per-tenant tracking domain, plus a per-user API-Key header (Settings > Security). Docs api.affise.com/docs3.1.

wanted.name: Scaleo
wanted.note: Multiplier — tenant engine. Per-tenant tracking URL + API key; admin enables API per role. Public docs developers.scaleo.io.

wanted.name: Offer18
wanted.note: Multiplier — tenant network engine. Self-serve affiliate API key + secret + mid (Account > Security). Docs knowledgebase.offer18.com/affiliate/affiliate-apis.

wanted.name: CAKE
wanted.note: Multiplier — per-instance base URL + key. OpenAPI-documented (~20 reporting APIs) at developer.cake.net/apis; key issued in-instance.

wanted.name: Post Affiliate Pro
wanted.note: Multiplier — SaaS, per-account subdomain {acct}.postaffiliatepro.com/api/v3. Self-serve bearer key (Config > Tools > Integration); Swagger RESTful CRUD on affiliates/transactions/reports.

wanted.name: NetRefer
wanted.note: iGaming multiplier with a public dev portal (developer.netrefer.com): OAuth2, ASR (Affiliate Standard Reporting) REST/OpenAPI + operator GraphQL. Per-operator tenant.

wanted.name: Affilae
wanted.note: FR network, cleanest net-new modern REST. Bearer token from the API Tokens menu; publisher + advertiser endpoints, amounts in cents. Docs rest.affilae.com/reference. Cross-confirmed by two research passes.

wanted.name: Optimise Media
wanted.note: UK/IN/APAC network. Public REST; apikey header via a self-serve Service Account in the Insights Dashboard. Campaigns, conversions (with basket items), product feeds. Docs docs.optimisemedia.com/api.

wanted.name: AccessTrade
wanted.note: SE-Asia/Japan leader. Authorization: Token <access_key> (key from publisher profile). Campaigns, conversion reports, creatives, datafeed, payments. Docs support.accesstrade.global/api.

wanted.name: Travelpayouts
wanted.note: Global travel vertical. Self-serve X-Access-Token (Profile > API token); booking/conversion statistics + balance/payment APIs. Docs travelpayouts.github.io/slate.

wanted.name: Flipkart Affiliate
wanted.note: India. Public docs affiliate.flipkart.com/api-docs; self-gen API token + tracking ID headers; product feed, offer, order/report APIs. Caveat: Flipkart periodically pauses new affiliate signups — verify the programme is open.

wanted.name: Adrecord
wanted.note: Nordic (SE). Self-serve private API key (APIKEY header); separate affiliate + advertiser docs (api.v2.adrecord.com/docs). Programs, channels, statistics; 30 req/30s.

wanted.name: Addrevenue
wanted.note: Nordic (SE). OAuth2 lifetime token (Tools > API Tokens); transactions, clicks, payments, invoices across 900+ advertisers. Docs addrevenue.io/en/developers.

wanted.name: eHUB
wanted.note: CZ/CEE. Apiary v3 docs (ehub.docs.apiary.io — NOT docs.ehub.com, which is an unrelated logistics firm). API key; programs, transactions with rich filters, coupons, clicks.

wanted.name: LinkConnector
wanted.note: US network (~700 advertisers). Self-serve API key (Tools > API); HTTP POST function API for promotion feed, transaction + delta reports, affiliate links. CSV/JSON/XML. Docs linkconnector.com/help_api.htm.

wanted.name: Connexity (ShopYourLikes)
wanted.note: US CPC-commerce network, distinct from the existing Skimlinks adapter. Publisher ID + API key from the publisher portal; deep-link, reporting, merchant-match, catalog APIs. Docs pubresources.connexity.com.

wanted.name: Affiliate Future
wanted.note: UK network. Self-serve API key + password (Reporting APIs page); merchant list + GetTransactionListbyDate. Caveats: dated .svc endpoints (api.affiliatefuture.com/PublisherService.svc) and a 1-day-per-call pull window.

wanted.name: Effiliation (Effinity)
wanted.note: Established FR network. API key from Tools > API; programmes, transactions, links/feeds refreshed ~every 2h. Docs apiv2.effiliation.com/apiv2/doc.

wanted.name: 2Performant
wanted.note: Romania. Self-serve but auth is credential/session-based (email+password -> session), not a static key — handle that quirk. RESTful JSON; programs, commissions, links. Docs doc.2performant.com; official PHP wrapper exists.

wanted.name: Profitshare
wanted.note: Romania. Self-serve API key + API user, HMAC-signed requests. Advertisers, campaigns, products, commissions, cashback. Docs doc.profitshare.com; reference impl on GitHub.

wanted.name: FirstPromoter
wanted.note: SaaS-referral (same cohort as the existing Rewardful/Tolt/Refersion adapters). Self-serve bearer key + ACCOUNT-ID header (Settings > Integrations); promoters, leads, commissions, payouts. Single host api.firstpromoter.com. Docs docs.firstpromoter.com.

wanted.name: Partnero
wanted.note: SaaS-referral. Per-program bearer token (Program > Integration > API). Customers, partners, transactions, rewards/payouts; official PHP SDK. Docs developers.partnero.com.

wanted.name: GrowSurf
wanted.note: SaaS-referral. Self-serve bearer key; ~24 endpoints (participants, trigger referrals, program/participant data) + webhooks. Docs docs.growsurf.com.

wanted.name: LeadDyno
wanted.note: SaaS-referral. Self-serve private key (Profile); affiliates CRUD/approve/reject, purchases CRUD/list. REST + JS API. Docs app.theneo.io/leaddyno.
